signals.headline: Lib Dem Leader Ed Davey Demands Cancellation of King Charles' April US Visit Amid Trump-UK Tensions Over Iran Conflict |
signals.raw:
Lib Dem Leader Ed Davey Demands Cancellation of King Charles' April US Visit Amid Trump-UK Tensions Over Iran Conflict | NO | LOW confidence**

No breaking confirmation, announcement, or resolution has occurred as of April 15, 2026—only opposition calls to cancel the planned trip.[1][2] Ed Davey urged PM Keir Starmer to scrap the visit, citing Trump's "dangerous and reckless" threats against Iran
